Many model configurations (e.g., Qwen3) follow a structure where rope_theta is located at the top level of the configuration dictionary.
Example Config:
{
  "architectures": ["Qwen3ForCausalLM"],
  "model_type": "qwen3",
  "rope_scaling": null,
  "rope_theta": 1000000,
  "transformers_ver

sglang.title: [model-gateway] optimize core modules
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Performance optimizations:

Fix double lock acquisition in CircuitBreaker.state() and can_execute() by returning state from check_and_update_state
Change Worker.worker_type() and connection_mode() to return references instead of cloning on each call
Parallelize health checks using futures::join_all

sglang.title: [SMG] perf: optimize tokenizer for reduced CPU and memory overhead
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Use Arc in L0 cache for zero-copy cache hits
Use Arc<[TokenIdType]> in L1 cache for efficient token sharing
Replace clone() with std::mem::take() in stop.rs to avoid allocations
Use String::split_off() instead of drain().collect() for zero-copy buffer splitting
Add #[inline] hints to hot path method

sglang.title: Add FP8 Blockwise GEMM Backend Flag `--fp8-gemm-backend`
sglang.author: b8zhong
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
It could either be an env var, or a flag. Flag for now.
The selection logic is still the same.
Currently, we only do this for the Blockwise GEMM, I feel there can be an improved design for sharing this with the scaled MM, or maybe FP4, etc. but it can be done in the future.
Fix #13773

sglang.title: fix: checking if tokenizer is in cache before downloading from HF
sglang.author: dougyster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, CI tests are hitting HuggingFace rate limits when loading tokenizers:
huggingface_hub.errors.HfHubHTTPError: 429 Client Error: Too Many Requests
We had to rate limit you, you hit the quota of 3000 api requests per 5 minutes period.

This occurred in tests like test_srt_backend.

sglang.title: fix: making rate limit a warning instead of error
sglang.author: dougyster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, when API rate limits are hit, the script fails and marks the CI job as failed, even though the actual tests passed. This PR treats rate limit errors as warnings instead of failures, since trace uploads are optional and shouldn't block CI success.
From lianmin:

make the rate li

Replace slice_by_chars() with NodeText::spli

vllm.author: haoyangli0109
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Qwen3moe cannot effectively recognize the kv_cache scale. We need to call the get_cache_scale method in the base class to identify it.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Cache added_vocab to avoid per-token overhead
vllm.author: scratch-ml
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FIX #30343
When serving DeepSeek-V3.2 in tokenizer-mode, main thread is busy in detokenization.
detokenize_incrementally runs on every generated token and checks len(tokenizer), which invokes DeepseekV32Tokenizer.__len__.

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Attempt to fix the failures under a subgroup of the e2e the test group
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR ensures that during test_async_scheduling, we utilize the TRITON_ATTN backend which is the default attention backend for ROCm.
